metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_405
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig. 3: colocalization of ApoE with Synapsin I
Fig. 4: biochemical fractionation confirms synaptic localization of ApoE, colocalization of ApoE with vGlut1 and Map2

NOTE: ApoE is a secreted proteins, therfore only synaptic cleft annotation is made. The colocalization with vGlut1 in synaptoneurosome showed in Fig.4 suggests that ApoE is localized at glutamatergic synapses.. Experimental description: Experiments with human brain tissue form buject with Alzheimer's disease or
no cognitive deficits. These experiments are featured in Fig. 3 and Fig. 4

Literal M&M
"Subjects
Brains from human subjects with a diagnosis of Alzheimer's disease or
no cognitive deficits were obtained through the Massachusetts
Alzheimer's Disease Research Centre and Massachusetts General
Hospital Neuropathology department."
